text.title: W3C Design Tokens Standard Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory
step.action: Catalogue raw values per platform; mark each as primitive or semantic candidate.

step.name: split-layers
step.action: Partition into primitive (raw) + semantic (aliased intent) layers.
step.decision-gate: If a value is used in only one place, it stays primitive — does not need a semantic name.

step.name: author-dtcg
step.action: Convert to DTCG: $type, $value, $description; semantic uses {alias} references.

step.name: resolve-and-contrast-check
step.action: Resolve every alias; for color tokens used as text/background, verify ≥4.5:1 contrast.
step.decision-gate: If contrast fails, choose a different primitive or adjust semantic mapping.

step.name: validate-and-publish
step.action: Run `validate-w3c-design-tokens-standard.py`. Publish to design-system repo + Figma library.
